subject: fix: remove X-Frame-Options header blocking cross-origin embeds
body:
The SAMEORIGIN header added in H4 audit fix (19e1e21) blocked all
cross-origin iframes, breaking the embed feature. See-veo and other
apps embedding repo-tor charts via ?embed= got "refused to connect".
Vercel header matching is path-based only, so the embed.js exemption
didn't cover the HTML page loaded in iframes.

Removed the header entirely — the dashboard is public with no auth,
so there's no clickjacking risk. Cross-origin framing is intentional.

Tags: security, embed, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: embed-system
Semver: patch
